name: cursor-handoff
description: Control your local Cursor agent from a phone — web UI and Telegram bridge, no cloud runtime.

cursorHandoff.autoStart.markdownDescription: Start the local server automatically when Cursor opens.

cursorHandoff.cdpUrl.markdownDescription: Cursor CDP URL. Cursor must launch with `--remote-debugging-port=9222`. [Remote debugging setup](docs/guide.md#enable-cdp).

cursorHandoff.serverPort.markdownDescription: TCP port for the web UI and socket.io (default 3000).

cursorHandoff.serverHost.markdownDescription: Interface to bind. `127.0.0.1` = this PC only; `0.0.0.0` = LAN (web password required). Tailscale: [Tailscale guide](docs/guide.md#tailscale).

cursorHandoff.dataDir.markdownDescription: Folder for runtime state (topics, queue, Wake). Empty uses `<repo>/data/`.

cursorHandoff.locale.markdownDescription: Language for Handoff settings, sidebar, web client, and Telegram (`en` or `ru`).

cursorHandoff.pollIntervalMs.markdownDescription: How often the server polls Cursor DOM (milliseconds).

cursorHandoff.debounceMs.markdownDescription: Debounce before broadcasting state changes to clients (milliseconds).

cursorHandoff.webappPassword.markdownDescription: Password for the phone web UI. Generated on first install if empty. [Settings reference](docs/reference.md).

cursorHandoff.webTunnel.enabled.markdownDescription: Start a Cloudflare quick tunnel with the server (Windows, macOS, Linux). URL in `data/web-tunnel-url.json`; `/web_url` in Telegram # General.

cursorHandoff.wake.startupEnabled.markdownDescription: Add CursorWake to Windows Startup (run at logon). Toggle in Handoff settings after install.

cursorHandoff.windowTitleQualifier.markdownDescription: Append remote hints (WSL, SSH) to Cursor window titles for routing.

cursorHandoff.telegram.enabled.markdownDescription: Turn on the Telegram forum bridge. [Telegram bridge guide](docs/telegram.md).

cursorHandoff.telegram.allowedUsers.markdownDescription: Comma-separated Telegram user IDs allowed to use the bot.

cursorHandoff.telegram.impl.markdownDescription: `raw` (recommended, fetch Bot API) or `grammy`. See [Telegram guide](docs/telegram.md#bot-wont-connect) if the bot never connects.

walkthroughs.title: Getting started with CursorHandoff
walkthroughs.description: Monitor sessions, approve steps, and task from phone or Telegram.

steps.title: Verify CDP
steps.description:
Launch Cursor with `--remote-debugging-port=9222` and start the server.

[Start server](command:cursorHandoff.start) · [Remote debugging setup](command:cursorHandoff.openDoc?%22docs%2Fguide.md%23enable-cdp%22)

steps.title: Web access
steps.description:
By default the server listens on localhost only. Open Handoff settings → Web access for phone use.

[Open Handoff settings](command:cursorHandoff.openHandoffSettings) · [Remote access guide](command:cursorHandoff.openDoc?%22docs%2Fguide.md%23remote-access%22)

steps.title: Telegram bot (optional)
steps.description:
Telegram for notifications and commands.

[Configure Telegram](command:cursorHandoff.openHandoffSettings) · [Telegram bridge guide](command:cursorHandoff.openDoc?%22docs%2Ftelegram.md%22)

steps.title: Optional add-ons
steps.description:
CursorWake (Windows), Cloudflare quick tunnel (all platforms), and global agent skills.

[Install CursorWake](command:cursorHandoff.installWake) · [Install cloudflared](command:cursorHandoff.installCloudflared) · [Install agent skills](command:cursorHandoff.installAgentSkills)

[Cloudflare guide](command:cursorHandoff.openDoc?%22docs%2Fguide.md%23cloudflare%22) · Handoff settings → **Add-ons**.

steps.title: Open web client
steps.description:
Ready! Open the web client on your phone.

[Open web client](command:cursorHandoff.openWebClient)

Quick reference:
- Status bar — connection state (click to start/stop the server)
- Activity bar — CursorHandoff panel: windows, model, pending approvals
- Command Palette — commands prefixed with `CursorHandoff:`
- Output — CursorHandoff channel for server logs

Docs: [Getting started guide](command:cursorHandoff.openDoc?%22docs%2Fguide.md%22) · [Telegram bridge guide](command:cursorHandoff.openDoc?%22docs%2Ftelegram.md%22) · [Settings reference](command:cursorHandoff.openDoc?%22docs%2Freference.md%22)

scripts.build: tsc && node scripts/build/copy-client.mjs && node extension/esbuild.js --production && node scripts/build/stage-extension-bundled.mjs
